mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER VALUES (#{id}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberPicture}, #{memberName}, #{memberNickname})
mapper.select: SELECT TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_PASSWORD, TBM.MEMBER_PICTURE, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TSSM.MEMBER_ID, TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER FROM TBL_MEMBER TBM JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER TSSM ON TBM.ID = TSSM.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBM.ID = #{id}

SELECT TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_PASSWORD, TBM.MEMBER_PICTURE, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, TSSM.MEMBER_ID, TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER FROM TBL_MEMBER TBM JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER TSSM ON TBM.ID = TSSM.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER = #{socialMemberProvider}

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(TBM.ID) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TBL_MEMBER TBM JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER TSSM ON TBM.ID = TSSM.MEMBER_ID WHERE TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND TSSM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER = #{socialMemberProvider}
